title: Training Language Models to Use Prolog as a Tool
abstract: arXiv:2512.07407v3 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: Language models frequently produce plausible yet incorrect reasoning traces that are difficult to verify. We investigate fine-tuning models to use Prolog as an external symbolic reasoning tool, training Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) on a cleaned version of GSM8K (which we release as gsm8k-prolog-prover). We systematically vary prompt structure, reward composition (execution, syntax, semantics, structure), and inference protocol (single-try, multiple-try, and two agentic modes). Our reinforcement learning approach outperforms supervised fine-tuning on GSM8K, and the resulting 3B model achieves zero-shot performance on MMLU-STEM and MMLU-Pro competitive with 7B few-shot baselines. Most importantly, we identify an accuracy--auditability trade-off: configurations tuned for correctness alone learn to delegate reasoning to natural language and use Prolog only for the final computation, while configurati

Title: Training Language Models to Use Prolog as a Tool

translated_title: 训练语言模型将Prolog用作工具
translated_abstract: arXiv:2512.07407v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：语言模型经常产生看似合理但实际错误的推理轨迹，且这些轨迹难以验证。我们研究通过微调使模型将Prolog用作外部符号推理工具，在GSM8K的清洗版本（我们将其发布为gsm8k-prolog-prover）上，使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）训练Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct。我们系统地变化提示结构、奖励组成（执行、语法、语义、结构）和推理协议（单次尝试、多次尝试以及两种代理模式）。我们的强化学习方法在GSM8K上优于监督式微调，并且得到的3B模型在MMLU-STEM和MMLU-Pro上实现了零样本性能，与7B少样本基线相当。最重要的是，我们识别出一个准确性-可审计性权衡：仅针对正确性调整的配置学会将推理委托给自然语言，仅将Prolog用于最终计算，而其他配置则……
tldr: 本文通过强化学习微调语言模型使用Prolog作为外部推理工具，发现准确性提升与推理可审计性之间存在权衡，且仅追求正确性的模型会依赖自然语言推理而将Prolog仅用于最终计算。
en_tdlr: This paper fine-tunes language models to use Prolog as an external reasoning tool via reinforcement learning, revealing a trade-off between accuracy and auditability, where models optimized solely for correctness delegate reasoning to natural language and use Prolog only for final computation.
